title: Benchkit Refs Index
description: Navigation index grouping benchmark runs by git ref, produced by bench-aggregate.

latestRunId.description: Run ID of the most recent run for this ref.

latestTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the most recent run for this ref.

latestCommit.description: Commit SHA of the most recent run for this ref.

runCount.description: Total number of runs for this ref.
